headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips While Intel Gains; Google Stock Clears Entry, But Note This (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones index falls Monday. Intel rises but chip stocks lag. Google parent Alphabet clears an entry on the stock market today.

headline: How The McDonald's (MCD) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Growth And Valuation
summary: The latest analyst update on McDonald's includes a modest fair value adjustment from US$344.85 to US$345.00, a move that sits alongside a wave of Street target changes across the name. Analysts raising or trimming targets into the mid US$300s, including moves to US$325, US$354, US$360 and US$385, are using these shifts to debate how much of the long term growth and earnings story is already reflected in the share price. Read on to see what is driving these moves and how to keep track of the...

headline: McDonald's takes aim at Starbucks with new drinks menu
summary: McDonald's has tried for decades to win more beverage business. The fast-food giant never mentions Starbucks, but that's the giant in the space, from which the Big Mac-maker would have to take share in order to meaningfully impact its business. It's a move for the burger chain to unlock added sales ...
